title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICICI Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICICI Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ICICI Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ICICI Bank:
ICICI Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Bank!
